name: hal
description: Skills for developing and testing halOP — the WildFly management console

skills.name: hal-dev-env
skills.description: Start and manage a local WildFly + halOP dev environment

skills.name: hal-explore
skills.description: Analyze halOP test coverage gaps and explore the UI to propose new test scenarios

skills.name: hal-implement
skills.description: Implement new halOP tests interactively with propose-approve-implement loop

skills.name: hal-ouia
skills.description: Add missing OUIA IDs to halOP for testability, create PRs, and sync back to dave

skills.name: hal-record
skills.description: Record browser interactions via Playwright codegen and scaffold test proposals
